title: Great Citizen
writer: Mikhail Bleiman, Manuel Bolshintsov, Fridrikh Ermler
actors: Nikolay Bogolyubov, Ivan Bersenev, Oleg Zhakov
plot: In the guise of a character named Chakov, Ermler reconstructs in his epic the achievement of popular Leningrad leader Kirov, who was killed in 1934,and creates a portrait of political discussions and struggles during the 30s.
